# Sprint 1.3 Reliability Mechanisms

**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Data Ingestion Layer
**Objective:** Design and implement the data ingestion layer, including landing zone, ingestion strategy, and reliability mechanisms.

## Description
Implement reliability mechanisms, including file-level idempotency, metadata tracking, and dead-letter handling.

## Deliverable
Implemented reliability mechanisms
